summary: Full backend and frontend testing of Yrvante Lead Finder v2. All 8 backend tests passed. All frontend flows tested and working: search, save lead, tabs, status update, social links, CSV export, dashboard, sheets not-configured message.

design_issues.screen: Mijn Leads tab - Mijn Leads count badge
issues: Count badge shows '0' styling even when leads exist (cosmetic - the numeric 0 font is same as content font, slightly confusing as it looks italic/different)

critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 148: search_history insert_one does not exclude _id but returns raw response - only internal so not exposed
Phone link: many loodgieter Almelo results had no phone numbers (national_phone_number not returned by API for those places) - this is expected behavior from Google Places API, not a bug
Background image on Zoeken tab uses a forest/misty landscape which may not be perfectly relevant to a lead finder tool for Dutch businesses, but it's a brand design choice
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed leads created and cleaned up during testing. One lead 'Loodgieter Express' from loodgieter/Almelo search was saved during frontend testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working: search (POST /api/zoek), save lead (POST /api/leads), get leads (GET /api/leads), update status (PUT /api/leads/{id}), delete (DELETE /api/leads/{id}), dashboard (GET /api/dashboard), sheets status (GET /api/sheets/status - returns configured=false as expected). Frontend: 3 tabs work, search returns results, save/status update/delete all work, social links (FB/IG/KVK) present, CSV export button present, dashboard shows stats + recente zoekopdrachten + sheets not-configured instructions.
rca_of_issues: No issues found. All endpoints and UI flows working correctly.
